name: Hydrogen peroxide
description: Hydrogen peroxide is the simplest peroxide with a chemical formula H2O2. Hydrogen peroxide is an unstable compound in the presence of a base or catalyst. If heated to its boiling point, it may undergo potentially explosive thermal decomposition. It is typically stored with a stabilizer in a weakly acidic solution. Hydrogen peroxide is used in industrial and cosmetic applications as a bleaching agent. It is commonly used as a disinfectant agent; it is often used to sterilize surgical tools in the clinical setting. It is also considered as a generally recognized as safe compound by the FDA; it is used as an antimicrobial agent in starch and cheese products, and as an oxidizing and reducing agent in products containing dried eggs, dried egg whites, and dried egg yolks.
